# Systems

## Paths and repos
- OpenClaw workspace: `/home/mike/.openclaw/workspace`
- Obsidian vault: `/home/mike/vault`
- Ellen memory repo: `/home/mike/ellen-memory`

## Git remotes
- Vault repo uses SSH host alias `github-openclaw-vault`
- Workspace repo uses SSH host alias `github-openclaw-workspace`

## Integrations
- Gmail skill works through Maton using `MATON_API_KEY`.
- Google Calendar is not currently available through the same Maton flow.
- Marketplace calendar skills `gcalcli-calendar` and `gog-calendar` were installed into the workspace, but their required local binaries/config are not yet completed.
